title: European gas rallies after EC sets high price cap
section_path: European gas rallies after EC sets high price cap
section_path_text: European gas rallies after EC sets high price cap
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk on tone across markets boosted sentiment across the commodity complex. This was further supported by ongoing supply side issues. Crude oil struggled to keep its head above water in early trading amid an uncertain economic backdrop.
